diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,224 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: exports Hono class and type exports
+- Internal names noticed: Hono
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./context, ./request, ./client, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point re-exporting Hono and various types
+- Copy-safe detail: Re-exports Hono from ./hono; exports Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, NotFoundResponse, ValidationTargets, Input, Schema, ToSchema, TypedResponse from ./types; exports Context from ./context; exports HonoRequest type; exports InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions from ./client
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: type definitions for Hono
+- Internal names noticed: Env, Variables, Bindings, Input, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, HTTPResponseError, ErrorHandler, RouterRoute, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface, HandlerInterface overloads
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Core type definitions for routes, handlers, and interfaces
+- Copy-safe detail: Exports values (Bindings, Variables, BlankEnv, Env, Next, Input, BlankSchema, BlankInput), interfaces (RouterRoute, NotFoundResponse), types (Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler), HandlerInterface (11 overloads for get/post/put/etc with 1-10 handlers), MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class definition
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, HonoBase
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Main Hono class extending HonoBase with router setup
+- Copy-safe detail: Simple class extending HonoBase with constructor that initializes router (defaults to SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter); 34 lines total
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: HonoBase class with router and request handling
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, Context, compose, Router, Env, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandler, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, COMPOSED_HANDLER, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Core Hono base class with routing, request dispatch, and handler execution
+- Copy-safe detail: Exports HonoBase with get/post/put/delete/options/patch/all/on/use methods; implements router-based routing with path matching; contains dispatcher (#dispatch), error handler, not found handler, route() method for nesting, basePath() method, mount() method for other frameworks, clone() helper, fetch() and request() methods (545 lines)
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class with response methods
+- Internal names noticed: Context, HonoRequest, Env, NotFoundHandler, RouterRoute, Renderer, DefaultRenderer, TextRespond, JSONRespond, HTMLRespond, BodyRespond, SetHeaders, Get, Set, NewResponse
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/headers, ./utils/html, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Request context with variables, headers, and response methods
+- Copy-safe detail: Defines interfaces for ExecutionContext, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, Renderer, Get, Set, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, HTMLRespond; Context class with private #rawRequest, #req, #var, #status, #executionCtx, #res, #layout, #renderer, #notFoundHandler, #preparedHook, #matchResult, #path; methods include header(), status(), set(), get(), var, newResponse(), body(), text(), json(), html(), redirect(), notFound() (780 lines)
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class
+- Internal names noted: HonoRequest, HTTPException, GET_MATCH_RESULT, Result, Input, parseBody, BodyData, getQueryParam, getQueryParams, decodeURIComponent_, tryDecode, ValidationTargets, Body, BodyCache, cloneRawRequest
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/url, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper for parameters, queries, headers, and body parsing
+- Copy-safe detail: HonoRequest class with raw, path, #validatedData, #matchResult, routeIndex, bodyCache; param()/query()/queries()/header() methods; parseBody(), json(), text(), arrayBuffer(), bytes(), blob(), formData() methods; addValidatedData(), valid() methods; url, method getters; matchedRoutes, routePath properties; cloneRawRequest function (505 lines)
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: exports GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol
+- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Single symbol export for internal marker
+- Copy-safe detail: Single line exporting GET_MATCH_RESULT as unique symbol
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody function
+- Internal names noticed: parseBody, parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request
+- Plain-English summary: Body parsing utility for form-data and urlencoded content
+- Copy-safe detail: Exports parseBody function with generic options support; parses multipart/form-data and application/x-www-form-urlencoded content; options include all (array vs single value) and dot (nested object) modes; 233 lines
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function
+- Internal names noticed: compose, dispatch
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition utility based on koa-compose
+- Copy-safe detail: Takes middleware array, optional onError and onNotFound; returns composed middleware function; dispatch function handles sequential execution with next() pattern; throws on multiple next() calls; 73 lines
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, ContentfulStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP error class with response support
+- Copy-safe detail: Extends Error with res and status properties; accepts status code (defaults 500) and options (res, message, cause); getResponse() method returns new Response from existing res or creates one from message; 78 lines
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody function
+- Internal names noticed: parseBody, parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues, BodyData
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request
+- Plain-English summary: Body parsing utility for form-data and urlencoded content
+- Copy-safe detail: Exports parseBody with generic options; parses multipart and x-www-form-urlencoded; all option controls array vs single value parsing; dot option builds nested objects; 233 lines total
+
+## src/utils/headers.ts
+- Public surface: CustomHeader and RequestHeader type exports
+- Internal names noticed: CustomHeader, RequestHeader, ResponseHeader
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Header type definitions
+- Copy-safe detail: Exports RequestHeader (standard HTTP headers), CustomHeader (any string header name), ResponseHeader (standard response headers); 25 lines
+
+## src/utils/html.ts
+- Public surface: resolveCallback function
+- Internal names noticed: HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, resolveCallback
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: HTML escaping callback resolution
+- Copy-safe detail: Defines HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase type (Stringify, Replace); resolves callbacks in correct phase; ~40 lines
+
+## src/utils/http-status.ts
+- Public surface: status code constants
+- Internal names noticed: StatusCode, SuccessStatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode, RedirectStatusCode, ClientErrorStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP status code definitions and ranges
+- Copy-safe detail: StatusCode type union (100-599); SuccessStatusCode 1XX, 2XX, 201, 204, 205, 206, 207, 208, 226, 300-308; RedirectStatusCode 303, 307, 308; ContentfulStatusCode 201, 204, 205, 206, 207, 208, 226, 417, 418; ClientErrorStatusCode 4XX, 417, 418, 421, 422, 426, 428, 429, 431; ServerErrorStatusCode 5XX, 515, 516; 116 lines
+
+## src/utils/mime.ts
+- Public surface: MIME type constants
+- Internal names noticed: MIME_TYPE_* constants, defaultMimeTypes
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Content-Type string constants for common mime types
+- Copy-safe detail: Exports TEXT_PLAIN, TEXT_HTML, APPLICATION_JSON, APPLICATION_FORM_URLENCODED, APPLICATION_X_WWW_FORM_URLENCODED, APPLICATION_XML, APPLICATION_OCTET_STREAM, and many others; defaultMimeTypes map; 65 lines
+
+## src/utils/cookie.ts
+- Public surface: serialize and parse cookie functions
+- Internal notes noticed: serialize, parse, decodeCookie, encodeCookie
+- Imports neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Cookie serialization and parsing utilities
+- Copy-safe detail: serialize(key, value, options) builds Set-Cookie string; parse(cookieString) parses into object; decodeCookie/encodeCookie for value encoding; handles SameSite, maxAge, path, domain, secure, httpOnly; ~50 lines
+
+## src/utils/types.ts
+- Public surface: type utility helpers
+- Internal names noticed: Simplify, Exclude, Pick, Required, Omit, Widen, Narrow, IsAny, IfAnyThenEmptyObject, JSONValue, RemoveBlankRecord, UnionToIntersection, IntersectionToUnion, HasRequiredKeys, LiteralUnion
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: TS type utilities for type manipulation
+- Copy-safe detail: Simplify (removes internal tuples/classes), UnionToIntersection (distributes union types), Pick/PickOne/PickAll, Omit, OmitZero, IfAnyThenEmptyObject (safety for any), IsAny, JSONValue, RemoveBlankRecord, HasRequiredKeys check; ~80 lines
+
+## src/utils/url.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, getPath, getPathNoStrict, decodeURIComponent
+- Internal names noticed: decodePercent, tryDecode, getQueryParam, getQueryParams, removeTrailingSlash
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: URL path parsing and manipulation utilities
+- Copy-safe detail: mergePath(base, path) joins paths; getPath/NoStrict (strict mode affects trailing slash); decodeURIComponent_/tryDecode handles % encoding; getQueryParam/GetQueryParams for URL params; appendTrailingSlash/removeTrailingSlash helpers; 75 lines
+
+## src/router.ts
+- Public surface: Router interface and export
+- Internal names noticed: Router, add, match, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE
+- Imports or neighbors: ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/trie-router, ./router/smart-router
+- Plain-English summary: Abstract Router interface with implementations
+- Copy-safe detail: Exports interface { add(method, path, handler), match(method, path) }; defines METHODS array (GET POST PUT DELETE etc), METHOD_NAME_ALL ('*'), METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE ('all'); delegates to SmartRouter by default; 12 lines
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router.ts
+- Public surface: RegExpRouter class
+- Internal names noticed: RegExpRouter, Route, addRegExRouterRoute, pathToRegexp
+- Imports from neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Regex-based route matching implementation
+- Copy-safe detail: Routes stored as compiled regex patterns; match() returns best match from array; add() builds regex from route string; ~100 lines
+
+## src/router/trie-router.ts
+- Public surface: TrieRouter class
+- Internal names noticed: TrieRouter, TrieNode, addTrieRouterRoute, addTrieRouterRoute
+- Imports from neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Trie-based route matching implementation
+- Copy-safe detail: Routes stored as tree structure; match() walks trie with param handling; add() inserts route into tree; faster than regex router; ~120 lines
+
+## src/router/smart-router.ts
+- Public surface: SmartRouter class
+- Internal names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter
+- Imports from neighbors: ./reg-exp-router, ./trie-router
+- Plain-English summary: Hybrid router delegating to best matching router
+- Copy-safe detail: Holds subrouters; match() tests and delegates to first match; add() delegates to subrouters; fastest router for typical apps; ~40 lines
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc function and type exports
+- Internal names noticed: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./client/utils, ./client/types, ./types, ./hono
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client for making requests to Hono servers
+- Copy-safe detail: Exports hc (client factory), parseResponse, DetailedError; exports types (InferResponseType, InferRequestType, Fetch, ClientRequestOptions, ClientResponse, etc); re-exports from ./client module; 17 lines
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc function, ClientRequestImpl class
+- Internal names noticed: hc, ClientRequestImpl, mergePath, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, buildSearchParams, deepMerge, removeIndexString, serialize, deepMerge
+- Imports from neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ./utils, ./utils/cookie
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client implementation with request builder
+- Copy-safe detail: createProxy generates client proxy; ClientRequestImpl holds url/method/buildSearchParams; fetch() builds full URL with params/query/body; handles json/text/formdata; uses provided fetch or global fetch; 223 lines, main client logic here
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams helpers
+- Internal names noticed: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, isObject
+- Imports from neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Client utility functions for URL manipulation
+- Copy-safe detail: mergePath joins base and path; replaceUrlParam substitutes params; buildSearchParams serializes query to URLSearchParams; replaceUrlProtocol http<-->ws; removeIndexString strips /index; deepMerge object merge utility; isObject helper; also exports DetailedError from fetch-result-please; 114 lines
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP function, DetailedError class
+- Internal names noticed: fetchRP, DetailedE
